title: SUSPENSION AND RESUMPTION OF CRIMINAL PROCEEDINGS
author: Bobokhonov Akramkhon Alokhonovich  Senior lecturer of the Department Academy of Law Enforcement Agencies of the Republic of Uzbekistan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This article discusses the current issues of the institution of suspension and resumption of criminal proceedings. The decision to suspend criminal proceedings in judicial investigative activities is often taken. In recent years, there has been a sharp differentiation in the dynamics of suspended criminal cases. Despite the fact that this institution has existed in criminal procedure law for a long time, some theoretical problems related to the basics and procedural procedure for suspending and resuming a criminal case have not yet been solved. Unresolved issues objectively cause different approaches in law enforcement practice.  
    Key words:     criminal proceedings, procedural deadlines, suspension, resumption, reasonable time, personal rights
